violations.text: Allergen statement was lacking on take-out menus. Marketing was contacted during inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
Menu boards and/or order station are lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC dumped water and placed utensil in dry container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
Two hotel pans were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
The dishwasher (employed by facility management) was observed drying clean and sanitized dishes and utensils with a cloth towel. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
